# pexip_infinity_identity_provider_group (Resource)

Manages an identity provider group. Identity provider groups organize multiple identity providers for authentication and authorization management.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_identity_provider_group" "example" {
  name        = "Corporate SSO Group"
  description = "Group for corporate SSO identity providers"
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name used to refer to this Identity Provider Group. Maximum length: 250 characters.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the Identity Provider Group. Maximum length: 250 characters.
- `identity_provider` (Set of String) List of identity provider URIs associated with this group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the identity provider group.
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the identity provider group
